# MMS Implementation Plan

> **Status**: Verified comprehensive plan from spec + code analysis (v2.3)
> **Last Updated**: 2026-01-20
> **Last Verified**: 2026-01-20 (automated codebase scan)
> **Priority**: P1 (Critical) → P2 (High) → P3 (Medium) → P4 (Low)

---

## Verification Summary (2026-01-20)

| Component | Files | Lines | Tests | Status |
|-----------|-------|-------|-------|--------|
| Database Schema | 14 | 3,165 | N/A | ✅ Complete |
| Shared Library | 27 | ~7,261 | 308 | ✅ Complete |
| Domain Services | 6 | 7,470 | 237 | ✅ Complete |
| API Layer | 8 | ~600 | 0 | ⚠️ Foundation complete |
| Workers | 2 | ~350 | 0 | ⚠️ Infrastructure only |
| TypeScript Optimizer | 4 | ~950 | 28 | ✅ Fallback complete |
| C++ Optimizer | 0 | 0 | 0 | ❌ Not started |
| Frontend | 2 | 29 | 0 | ⚠️ Placeholder only |

**Package Status**:
- `@belt/tools` v0.1.2 in package.json - ✅ NOW IN USE (migrated from zod)
- `zod` - ✅ REMOVED from package.json
- `zustand` - ✅ REMOVED from package.json

---

## ⚠️ IMMEDIATE BLOCKERS (Fix Before Proceeding)

### BLOCKER-00: Verify that the Ralph Wiggum method in the ./ralph and ./spec folders and in other files is configured so that all deliveries are considered ready only after end-to-end tests, unit tests, tests with MCP playwrite (when appropriate/frontend involved), etc., among other necessary best practices.

### BLOCKER-1: PMSchedulerService NOT Exported (CRITICAL) ✅ RESOLVED
- **Issue**: `PMSchedulerService` is fully implemented (2,174 lines, 42 passing tests) but NOT exported in `src/services/index.ts`
- **Impact**: Cannot be imported by API routes, workers, or other services
- **Fix**: Add export to `src/services/index.ts`
- **Resolution**: Export added to `src/services/index.ts` on 2026-01-19

### BLOCKER-2: @belt/tools Migration (CRITICAL) ✅ RESOLVED
- **Issue**: Project uses `zod` for validation but README mandates `@belt/tools`
- **Issue**: `zustand` is in package.json but BLOCKED by `.claude/hooks/block-forbidden-packages.sh`
- **Issue**: React hooks (useState, useEffect) BLOCKED by `.agentrc.ts`
- **Impact**: Cannot build compliant UI; hooks will be rejected by automation
- **Fix**: Complete Phase 1.3 migration before any UI work
- **Resolution**: Migrated all Zod schemas to @belt/tools createSchema/createType, removed zod and zustand from package.json on 2026-01-20. All 384 tests pass.

### BLOCKER-3: Missing Lib Utility Tests (HIGH) ✅ RESOLVED
- **Issue**: Critical utilities have no test coverage:
  - `src/lib/utils/date.ts` - Compliance window calculations (CRITICAL for PM scheduling) ✅ Tests complete (90 tests)
  - `src/lib/utils/resilience.ts` - Circuit breaker logic (CRITICAL for Maximo integration) ✅ Tests complete (57 tests)
  - `src/lib/utils/transaction.ts` - Transaction rollback behavior ✅ Tests complete (51 tests)
  - `src/lib/errors/index.ts` - Error serialization ✅ Tests complete (110 tests)
- **Impact**: Bugs in these utilities cascade to all domain services
- **Resolution**: All critical lib utilities now have comprehensive test coverage (308 tests total)

---

## Current State Analysis

**Codebase Status**: Core Domain Services Complete (Phase 2)

### ✅ COMPLETE - Phase 1.1: Database Schema (100%)
- 30+ tables across 14 schema files (Drizzle ORM)
- 17 PostgreSQL enums defined
- TimescaleDB hypertable (7-day chunks, 30-day compression, 13-year retention)
- Materialized views for canvas optimization (v_canvas_strategic, v_canvas_tactical, v_manhour_canvas, v_drift_canvas)
- Database functions and triggers (train fitness sync, canvas refresh, scenario cleanup)
- Development seed data

### ✅ COMPLETE - Phase 1.2: Shared Library (100%)
- Database connection pool with health checks
- Redis connection with cache utilities
- BullMQ queue configuration for 8 worker types
- Pino structured logging with redaction
- OpenTelemetry tracing infrastructure
- Prometheus metrics (HTTP, PM, optimizer, fleet, drift, queue, ingestion)
- Typed error classes (30+) with error codes
- Date/time utilities (compliance windows, PM hierarchy, mileage projection)
- Resilience utilities (retry, circuit breaker)
- Transaction helpers with automatic rollback
- @belt/tools validation schemas (migrated from Zod)

### ✅ COMPLETE - Phase 2: Core Domain Services (6/6 services with 237+ passing tests)
| Service | Lines | Tests | Status |
|---------|-------|-------|--------|
| FleetService | 1,324 | 36 | ✅ Exported |
| IngestionService | 952 | 22 | ✅ Exported |
| UnavailabilityService | 867 | 35 | ✅ Exported |
| ServiceDemandService | 1,032 | 46 | ✅ Exported |
| RouteUtilizationService | 1,127 | 56 | ✅ Exported |
| PMSchedulerService | 2,174 | 42 | ✅ Exported |

### ✅ COMPLETE - Phase 1.3: @belt/tools Migration (100%)
- Zod → @belt/tools createSchema migration ✅ COMPLETE
- zustand removed from package.json ✅ COMPLETE
- zod removed from package.json ✅ COMPLETE
- State machine setup for UI pending (Phase 7 dependency)

### ⚠️ IN PROGRESS - Phase 3: Optimizers (~40%)
- `src/optimizer/` directory created with TypeScript fallback
- C++ OR-Tools binary not created ❌
- TypeScript fallback optimizer ✅ COMPLETE (greedy algorithm with hard/soft constraints)
- Optimizer worker processor ✅ COMPLETE (BullMQ integration)

### ❌ NOT STARTED - Phase 4: Supporting Services (0%)
- ManHourLevelingService, CostingService, BaselineService, DriftMonitorService, SimulationService

### ⚠️ IN PROGRESS - Phase 5: API Layer (~15%)
- **API Foundation Complete** (src/api/):
  - Hono framework with CORS, security headers, request tracing
  - Standard success/error response envelopes per spec 005
  - Fleet management endpoints complete (fleets, trains, depots, routes)
  - Server entry point at src/api/server.ts
- Remaining: Auth, PM, Optimizer, Canvas, Export endpoints (~38 endpoints)
- WebSocket hub not implemented

### ⚠️ PARTIAL - Phase 6: Integration (~20%)
- Resilience utilities complete (retry, circuit breaker) ✅
- Maximo integration foundation:
  - Database schema has `maximo_wo_id` field ✅
  - `MaximoLockError` error class ✅
  - `checkMaximoLock()` in PMSchedulerService ✅
  - `updateFromMaximo()` stub in UnavailabilityService ⚠️
  - Maximo REST client: NOT IMPLEMENTED ❌
  - Shadow record pattern: NOT IMPLEMENTED ❌
  - Sync service/workers: NOT IMPLEMENTED ❌
- Email notification service: NOT IMPLEMENTED ❌
- Report generation (PDF/Excel): NOT IMPLEMENTED ❌

### ❌ NOT STARTED - Phase 7: UI (~1%)
- React 18 + Vite shell exists (minimal):
  - `src/App.tsx` (13 lines - placeholder)
  - `src/main.tsx` (16 lines - entry point + BlueprintJS CSS imports)
- Infinite Canvas (deck.gl): NOT IMPLEMENTED
  - deck.gl packages installed (v9.2.5) but no imports in code
- All components: NOT IMPLEMENTED
  - BlueprintJS installed (v6.1.0) but only CSS imported, no components
- State management (@belt/tools): NOT SETUP
  - @belt/tools v0.1.2 installed but 0 imports in codebase
- React hooks: CORRECTLY NOT USED (blocked by .agentrc.ts)
- Missing directories: src/components/, src/pages/, src/store/

### ❌ NOT STARTED - Phase 8-9: Operations & Demo (0%)
- Docker, Kubernetes, observability, demo application

**Next Priority**: API Layer completion (Phase 5) → Supporting Services (Phase 4) → Integration (Phase 6)

**Critical Path**: ~~Database~~ → ~~Shared Lib~~ → ~~Domain Services~~ → ~~FIX BLOCKERS~~ → ~~Optimizers (TS)~~ → **API (in progress)** → Integration → UI

### 1.3 @belt/tools Migration (P1 - Critical)

> **CRITICAL**: Project uses Zod for validation but README mandates @belt/tools.
> zustand is in package.json but BLOCKED by .claude/hooks/block-forbidden-packages.sh
> React hooks (useState, useEffect, etc.) are BLOCKED by .agentrc.ts - use machine.useMachine()

#### Schema Migration (Zod → @belt/tools) ✅ COMPLETE (2026-01-20)
- [x] P1: Migrate primitive schemas (uuidSchema, dateStringSchema, mileageKmSchema) to createType
- [x] P1: Migrate enum schemas (fitnessStatusSchema, pmStatusSchema, dayTypeSchema, etc.) to createType enum syntax
- [x] P1: Migrate object schemas (trainSchema, pmScheduleSchema, mileageReadingSchema) to createSchema
- [x] P1: Migrate CSV row schemas (mileageCsvRowSchema, fleetRosterCsvRowSchema) with transform handling
- [x] P1: Migrate optimizer IPC schemas (optimizerInputSchema, optimizerOutputSchema)
- [x] P1: Migrate API response schemas (apiSuccessSchema, apiErrorSchema)
- [x] P1: Update parseSchema helper to use @belt/tools parse method
- [x] P1: Update formatZodErrors to work with @belt/tools validation errors (renamed to formatValidationErrors)
- [x] P1: Update all service imports from 'zod' to '@belt/tools'
- [x] P1: Remove 'zod' from package.json dependencies
- [x] P1: Remove 'zustand' from package.json dependencies (FORBIDDEN by hooks)

#### State Machine Setup (for Phase 7 UI)
- [ ] P2: Create src/store/index.ts with @belt/tools createMachine
- [ ] P2: Create fleetSlice (trains, selectedTrain, fitnessStatus filters)
- [ ] P2: Create canvasSlice (zoom, pan, viewportBounds, activeLayer)
- [ ] P2: Create pmSlice (schedules, selectedPM, dragState, constraints)
- [ ] P2: Create batch dispatch utility for 60fps WebGL updates (requestAnimationFrame batching)

#### Reference: @belt/tools Patterns
```typescript
// Schema validation (replaces Zod)
import { createSchema, createType, InferType } from '@belt/tools';

const TrainModel = createSchema({
  id: 'string',
  trainNumber: 'string',
  mileageKm: 'number',
  fitnessStatus: { enum: ['FIT', 'RESTRICTED', 'GROUNDED'] },
  tags: 'string[]',
  metadata: 'object?',
});
type Train = InferType<typeof TrainModel>;
const train = TrainModel.parse(data);

// State machine (replaces React hooks + zustand)
import { createSlice, createMachine } from '@belt/tools';

const fleetSlice = createSlice({
  id: 'fleet',
  initial: { trains: [], selected: null },
  cache: { policy: 'session' },
  reducers: {
    setTrains: (state, trains) => { state.trains = trains; },
    selectTrain: (state, id) => { state.selected = id; },
  },
});

const machine = createMachine({
  id: 'mms',
  slices: { fleet: fleetSlice },
  trackMetadata: false, // Critical for 60fps
});

// In React component (NO useState/useEffect!)
const { state, actions } = machine.useMachine('fleet');
```

---

## Notes

1. **Non-negotiable dependencies**: Corrective maintenance visibility and service demand are prerequisites for valid schedules
2. **Dual-solver architecture**: Strategic (GA) and tactical (OR-Tools CP-SAT) must share constraint envelope
3. **Explainability**: Every optimizer decision must include factor-based explanation traces
4. **Baseline/drift**: Long-term plans stabilize via published baselines; drift thresholds prevent jitter
5. **Material constraints**: PM scheduling without parts availability is operationally useless
6. **Cold-start risk**: Historical PM data will be incomplete - explicit confidence scoring required
7. **Audit compliance**: 12-year government contract mandates immutable audit trail with full attribution

---

## ⚠️ IMMEDIATE BLOCKERS (Fix Before Proceeding)

- [ ] P2: Create src/store/index.ts with @belt/tools createMachine

#### Reference: @belt/tools Patterns
```typescript
// Schema validation (replaces Zod)
import { createSchema, createType, InferType } from '@belt/tools';

const TrainModel = createSchema({
  id: 'string',
  trainNumber: 'string',
  mileageKm: 'number',
  fitnessStatus: { enum: ['FIT', 'RESTRICTED', 'GROUNDED'] },
  tags: 'string[]',
  metadata: 'object?',
});
type Train = InferType<typeof TrainModel>;
const train = TrainModel.parse(data);

// State machine (replaces React hooks + zustand)
import { createSlice, createMachine } from '@belt/tools';

const fleetSlice = createSlice({
  id: 'fleet',
  initial: { trains: [], selected: null },
  cache: { policy: 'session' },
  reducers: {
    setTrains: (state, trains) => { state.trains = trains; },
    selectTrain: (state, id) => { state.selected = id; },
  },
});

const machine = createMachine({
  id: 'mms',
  slices: { fleet: fleetSlice },
  trackMetadata: false, // Critical for 60fps
});

// In React component (NO useState/useEffect!)
const { state, actions } = machine.useMachine('fleet');
```

## Notes

1. **Non-negotiable dependencies**: Corrective maintenance visibility and service demand are prerequisites for valid schedules
2. **Dual-solver architecture**: Strategic (GA) and tactical (OR-Tools CP-SAT) must share constraint envelope
3. **Explainability**: Every optimizer decision must include factor-based explanation traces
4. **Baseline/drift**: Long-term plans stabilize via published baselines; drift thresholds prevent jitter
5. **Material constraints**: PM scheduling without parts availability is operationally useless
6. **Cold-start risk**: Historical PM data will be incomplete - explicit confidence scoring required
7. **Audit compliance**: 12-year government contract mandates immutable audit trail with full attribution

# MMS Implementation Plan

> **Status**: Verified comprehensive plan from spec + code analysis (v2.3)
> **Last Updated**: 2026-01-20
> **Last Verified**: 2026-01-20 (automated codebase scan)
> **Priority**: P1 (Critical) → P2 (High) → P3 (Medium) → P4 (Low)

---

## Verification Summary (2026-01-20)

| Component | Files | Lines | Tests | Status |
|-----------|-------|-------|-------|--------|
| Database Schema | 14 | 3,165 | N/A | ✅ Complete |
| Shared Library | 27 | ~7,261 | 308 | ✅ Complete |
| Domain Services | 6 | 7,470 | 237 | ✅ Complete |
| API Layer | 8 | ~600 | 0 | ⚠️ Foundation complete |
| Workers | 2 | ~350 | 0 | ⚠️ Infrastructure only |
| TypeScript Optimizer | 4 | ~950 | 28 | ✅ Fallback complete |
| C++ Optimizer | 0 | 0 | 0 | ❌ Not started |
| Frontend | 2 | 29 | 0 | ⚠️ Placeholder only |

**Package Status**:
- `@belt/tools` v0.1.2 in package.json - ✅ NOW IN USE (migrated from zod)
- `zod` - ✅ REMOVED from package.json
- `zustand` - ✅ REMOVED from package.json

---

## ⚠️ IMMEDIATE BLOCKERS (Fix Before Proceeding)

### BLOCKER-00: Verify that the Ralph Wiggum method in the ./ralph and ./spec folders and in other files is configured so that all deliveries are considered ready only after end-to-end tests, unit tests, tests with MCP playwrite (when appropriate/frontend involved), etc., among other necessary best practices.

### BLOCKER-1: PMSchedulerService NOT Exported (CRITICAL) ✅ RESOLVED
- **Issue**: `PMSchedulerService` is fully implemented (2,174 lines, 42 passing tests) but NOT exported in `src/services/index.ts`
- **Impact**: Cannot be imported by API routes, workers, or other services
- **Fix**: Add export to `src/services/index.ts`
- **Resolution**: Export added to `src/services/index.ts` on 2026-01-19

### BLOCKER-2: @belt/tools Migration (CRITICAL) ✅ RESOLVED
- **Issue**: Project uses `zod` for validation but README mandates `@belt/tools`
- **Issue**: `zustand` is in package.json but BLOCKED by `.claude/hooks/block-forbidden-packages.sh`
- **Issue**: React hooks (useState, useEffect) BLOCKED by `.agentrc.ts`
- **Impact**: Cannot build compliant UI; hooks will be rejected by automation
- **Fix**: Complete Phase 1.3 migration before any UI work
- **Resolution**: Migrated all Zod schemas to @belt/tools createSchema/createType, removed zod and zustand from package.json on 2026-01-20. All 384 tests pass.

### BLOCKER-3: Missing Lib Utility Tests (HIGH) ✅ RESOLVED

#### Reference: @belt/tools Patterns
```typescript
// Schema validation (replaces Zod)
import { createSchema, createType, InferType } from '@belt/tools';

const TrainModel = createSchema({
  id: 'string',
  trainNumber: 'string',
  mileageKm: 'number',
  fitnessStatus: { enum: ['FIT', 'RESTRICTED', 'GROUNDED'] },
  tags: 'string[]',
  metadata: 'object?',
});
type Train = InferType<typeof TrainModel>;
const train = TrainModel.parse(data);

// State machine (replaces React hooks + zustand)
import { createSlice, createMachine } from '@belt/tools';

const fleetSlice = createSlice({
  id: 'fleet',
  initial: { trains: [], selected: null },
  cache: { policy: 'session' },
  reducers: {
    setTrains: (state, trains) => { state.trains = trains; },
    selectTrain: (state, id) => { state.selected = id; },
  },
});

const machine = createMachine({
  id: 'mms',
  slices: { fleet: fleetSlice },
  trackMetadata: false, // Critical for 60fps
});

// In React component (NO useState/useEffect!)
const { state, actions } = machine.useMachine('fleet');
```

## Notes

1. **Non-negotiable dependencies**: Corrective maintenance visibility and service demand are prerequisites for valid schedules
2. **Dual-solver architecture**: Strategic (GA) and tactical (OR-Tools CP-SAT) must share constraint envelope
3. **Explainability**: Every optimizer decision must include factor-based explanation traces
4. **Baseline/drift**: Long-term plans stabilize via published baselines; drift thresholds prevent jitter
5. **Material constraints**: PM scheduling without parts availability is operationally useless
6. **Cold-start risk**: Historical PM data will be incomplete - explicit confidence scoring required
7. **Audit compliance**: 12-year government contract mandates immutable audit trail with full attribution

# MMS Implementation Plan

> **Status**: Verified comprehensive plan from spec + code analysis (v2.3)
> **Last Updated**: 2026-01-20
> **Last Verified**: 2026-01-20 (automated codebase scan)
> **Priority**: P1 (Critical) → P2 (High) → P3 (Medium) → P4 (Low)

---

## Verification Summary (2026-01-20)

| Component | Files | Lines | Tests | Status |
|-----------|-------|-------|-------|--------|
| Database Schema | 14 | 3,165 | N/A | ✅ Complete |
| Shared Library | 27 | ~7,261 | 308 | ✅ Complete |
| Domain Services | 6 | 7,470 | 237 | ✅ Complete |
| API Layer | 8 | ~600 | 0 | ⚠️ Foundation complete |
| Workers | 2 | ~350 | 0 | ⚠️ Infrastructure only |
| TypeScript Optimizer | 4 | ~950 | 28 | ✅ Fallback complete |
| C++ Optimizer | 0 | 0 | 0 | ❌ Not started |
| Frontend | 2 | 29 | 0 | ⚠️ Placeholder only |

**Package Status**:
- `@belt/tools` v0.1.2 in package.json - ✅ NOW IN USE (migrated from zod)
- `zod` - ✅ REMOVED from package.json
- `zustand` - ✅ REMOVED from package.json

---

## ⚠️ IMMEDIATE BLOCKERS (Fix Before Proceeding)

### BLOCKER-00: Verify that the Ralph Wiggum method in the ./ralph and ./spec folders and in other files is configured so that all deliveries are considered ready only after end-to-end tests, unit tests, tests with MCP playwrite (when appropriate/frontend involved), etc., among other necessary best practices.

### BLOCKER-1: PMSchedulerService NOT Exported (CRITICAL) ✅ RESOLVED
- **Issue**: `PMSchedulerService` is fully implemented (2,174 lines, 42 passing tests) but NOT exported in `src/services/index.ts`
- **Impact**: Cannot be imported by API routes, workers, or other services
- **Fix**: Add export to `src/services/index.ts`
- **Resolution**: Export added to `src/services/index.ts` on 2026-01-19

### BLOCKER-2: @belt/tools Migration (CRITICAL) ✅ RESOLVED
- **Issue**: Project uses `zod` for validation but README mandates `@belt/tools`
- **Issue**: `zustand` is in package.json but BLOCKED by `.claude/hooks/block-forbidden-packages.sh`
- **Issue**: React hooks (useState, useEffect) BLOCKED by `.agentrc.ts`
- **Impact**: Cannot build compliant UI; hooks will be rejected by automation
- **Fix**: Complete Phase 1.3 migration before any UI work
- **Resolution**: Migrated all Zod schemas to @belt/tools createSchema/createType, removed zod and zustand from package.json on 2026-01-20. All 384 tests pass.

### BLOCKER-3: Missing Lib Utility Tests (HIGH) ✅ RESOLVED
- **Issue**: Critical utilities have no test coverage:
  - `src/lib/utils/date.ts` - Compliance window calculations (CRITICAL for PM scheduling) ✅ Tests complete (90 tests)
  - `src/lib/utils/resilience.ts` - Circuit breaker logic (CRITICAL for Maximo integration) ✅ Tests complete (57 tests)
  - `src/lib/utils/transaction.ts` - Transaction rollback behavior ✅ Tests complete (51 tests)
  - `src/lib/errors/index.ts` - Error serialization ✅ Tests complete (110 tests)
- **Impact**: Bugs in these utilities cascade to all domain services
- **Resolution**: All critical lib utilities now have comprehensive test coverage (308 tests total)

---

## Current State Analysis

**Codebase Status**: Core Domain Services Complete (Phase 2)

### ✅ COMPLETE - Phase 1.1: Database Schema (100%)
- 30+ tables across 14 schema files (Drizzle ORM)
- 17 PostgreSQL enums defined
- TimescaleDB hypertable (7-day chunks, 30-day compression, 13-year retention)
- Materialized views for canvas optimization (v_canvas_strategic, v_canvas_tactical, v_manhour_canvas, v_drift_canvas)
- Database functions and triggers (train fitness sync, canvas refresh, scenario cleanup)
- Development seed data

### ✅ COMPLETE - Phase 1.2: Shared Library (100%)
- Database connection pool with health checks
- Redis connection with cache utilities
- BullMQ queue configuration for 8 worker types
- Pino structured logging with redaction
- OpenTelemetry tracing infrastructure
- Prometheus metrics (HTTP, PM, optimizer, fleet, drift, queue, ingestion)
- Typed error classes (30+) with error codes
- Date/time utilities (compliance windows, PM hierarchy, mileage projection)
- Resilience utilities (retry, circuit breaker)
- Transaction helpers with automatic rollback
- @belt/tools validation schemas (migrated from Zod)

### ✅ COMPLETE - Phase 2: Core Domain Services (6/6 services with 237+ passing tests)
| Service | Lines | Tests | Status |
|---------|-------|-------|--------|
| FleetService | 1,324 | 36 | ✅ Exported |
| IngestionService | 952 | 22 | ✅ Exported |
| UnavailabilityService | 867 | 35 | ✅ Exported |
| ServiceDemandService | 1,032 | 46 | ✅ Exported |
| RouteUtilizationService | 1,127 | 56 | ✅ Exported |
| PMSchedulerService | 2,174 | 42 | ✅ Exported |

### ✅ COMPLETE - Phase 1.3: @belt/tools Migration (100%)
- Zod → @belt/tools createSchema migration ✅ COMPLETE
- zustand removed from package.json ✅ COMPLETE
- zod removed from package.json ✅ COMPLETE
- State machine setup for UI pending (Phase 7 dependency)

### ⚠️ IN PROGRESS - Phase 3: Optimizers (~40%)
- `src/optimizer/` directory created with TypeScript fallback
- C++ OR-Tools binary not created ❌
- TypeScript fallback optimizer ✅ COMPLETE (greedy algorithm with hard/soft constraints)
- Optimizer worker processor ✅ COMPLETE (BullMQ integration)

### ❌ NOT STARTED - Phase 4: Supporting Services (0%)
- ManHourLevelingService, CostingService, BaselineService, DriftMonitorService, SimulationService

### ⚠️ IN PROGRESS - Phase 5: API Layer (~15%)
- **API Foundation Complete** (src/api/):
  - Hono framework with CORS, security headers, request tracing
  - Standard success/error response envelopes per spec 005
  - Fleet management endpoints complete (fleets, trains, depots, routes)
  - Server entry point at src/api/server.ts
- Remaining: Auth, PM, Optimizer, Canvas, Export endpoints (~38 endpoints)
- WebSocket hub not implemented

### ⚠️ PARTIAL - Phase 6: Integration (~20%)
- Resilience utilities complete (retry, circuit breaker) ✅
- Maximo integration foundation:
  - Database schema has `maximo_wo_id` field ✅
  - `MaximoLockError` error class ✅
  - `checkMaximoLock()` in PMSchedulerService ✅
  - `updateFromMaximo()` stub in UnavailabilityService ⚠️
  - Maximo REST client: NOT IMPLEMENTED ❌
  - Shadow record pattern: NOT IMPLEMENTED ❌
  - Sync service/workers: NOT IMPLEMENTED ❌
- Email notification service: NOT IMPLEMENTED ❌
- Report generation (PDF/Excel): NOT IMPLEMENTED ❌

### ❌ NOT STARTED - Phase 7: UI (~1%)
- React 18 + Vite shell exists (minimal):
  - `src/App.tsx` (13 lines - placeholder)
  - `src/main.tsx` (16 lines - entry point + BlueprintJS CSS imports)
- Infinite Canvas (deck.gl): NOT IMPLEMENTED
  - deck.gl packages installed (v9.2.5) but no imports in code
- All components: NOT IMPLEMENTED
  - BlueprintJS installed (v6.1.0) but only CSS imported, no components
- State management (@belt/tools): NOT SETUP
  - @belt/tools v0.1.2 installed but 0 imports in codebase
- React hooks: CORRECTLY NOT USED (blocked by .agentrc.ts)
- Missing directories: src/components/, src/pages/, src/store/

### ❌ NOT STARTED - Phase 8-9: Operations & Demo (0%)
- Docker, Kubernetes, observability, demo application

**Next Priority**: API Layer completion (Phase 5) → Supporting Services (Phase 4) → Integration (Phase 6)

**Critical Path**: ~~Database~~ → ~~Shared Lib~~ → ~~Domain Services~~ → ~~FIX BLOCKERS~~ → ~~Optimizers (TS)~~ → **API (in progress)** → Integration → UI
